case_title: BELLORIN MANUEL ANGEL VS AZZALINA TOM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BELLORIN MANUEL ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT AZZALINA TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
